title: Wireless Design, Configuration, and Validation · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Design staff, guest, and point-to-point wireless service across crowded, regulated, and mobile spaces. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a secure wireless survey and deployment plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare relevant 802.11 capabilities across 2.4, 5, and 6 GHz bands, channel availability, range, and client support.
Choose channel, width, reuse, and band steering from regulatory domain, overlap, contention, capacity, and coverage.
Distinguish SSID, BSSID, ESS, hidden names, and client discovery without treating an SSID as a security control.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
